506 MOVE_SLOW_FREQ_ADMSN_CD MOVE_SLOW_FREQ_ADMSN_CD Mood: Moving or speaking so slowly: F (A) CHAR 1 This column documents, at the time of admission, the frequency with which the patient is moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the
